The Vision

To Unite the Seven Sisters on One National Platform

North-East India holds immense untapped talent, rich heritage, and a booming youth population. The Grand Northeast Festival 2026 creates a unified national platform for all 7 states to shine together — celebrating culture, driving commerce, and connecting the region to India's mainstream stage.

Zone 01 · Technology Summit

NORTHEAST
MEETS
ARTIFICIAL
INTELLIGENCE

For the first time, the world's most transformative technology is coming directly to Northeast India — through immersive workshops, live demos and panels with national and global industry leaders. Here is why it matters now.

$1.8T
Global AI market size by 2030 (Goldman Sachs)
300M
Jobs to be augmented by AI globally by 2030
40%
Indian workforce needing AI reskilling by 2028
$6B+
India AI investment from govt. & private sector 2024
Why AI Matters for Northeast India
The Skills Gap is Real

NE India graduates 200,000+ students annually — yet less than 5% have exposure to AI tools. Early exposure creates career advantages that last decades. This summit bridges that gap permanently.

Startup Opportunity

India's startup ecosystem is the 3rd largest globally. NE India has untapped founder potential — organic agriculture, tourism and handicrafts are ripe for AI disruption by local founders.

Government is Investing Now

The India AI Mission (₹10,372 Cr.) and Digital North-East Vision 2022 create the perfect moment for NE India to plug into national AI infrastructure and talent pipelines.

Generative AI & LLMs

ChatGPT surpassed 200M users in 2024. Models like GPT-4, Gemini Ultra and Claude are redefining productivity. Live demos show real-world applications for NE businesses and startups.

Robotics & Automation

Boston Dynamics, Tesla Optimus and India's homegrown robots are entering manufacturing and agriculture. Live robotics demos will show NE entrepreneurs what is now possible to build locally.

AI in Agriculture

Precision farming, AI crop disease detection and drone monitoring are revolutionising yields. With NE's organic farming strength, AI integration can unlock premium global markets for local farmers.

Startup Pitch Arena

India produced 111 unicorns by 2024. AI-first startups attract the most VC funding. The Startup Pitch Arena directly connects NE founders with national investors for the first time.

AI Keynotes & Panels

Industry leaders from Bengaluru, Mumbai and global tech hubs address Northeast India's AI future and opportunities.

Live Robotics Demos

Hands-on experience with robotics, AI tools, AR/VR and emerging technologies from India and abroad.

Startup Pitch Arena

NE India's best founders pitch to investors, VCs and government representatives for funding and mentorship.

Skill Workshops

Hands-on sessions in AI tools, coding, digital entrepreneurship and product design for NE students and professionals.

Zone 04 · Cultural & Music Festival Arena · In Loving Memory
♪
The Humming King of the World
♪
Zubeen
Garg
18 November 1972  –  19 September 2025

"He was not just a voice — he was the heartbeat of Assam, a crownless monarch who ruled with love, rhythm and fearlessness."

38,000+ Songs 30+ Years of Music Largest Funeral in Asia Google — Humming King Ya Ali · Bihu · Bollywood
His Legacy

From "Ya Ali" to Bihu classics, sang in over 38,000 songs across Assamese, Bengali, Hindi and Sanskrit. Google honoured him as "The Humming King of the World."

His Soul

Left Bollywood to serve Assam. Sang at CAA protest sites. Helped flood victims. Gave away everything. "I have no religion, no caste. I am free. I simply love everyone."

His Farewell

When he passed on September 19, 2025, over one million people walked with him — the largest funeral procession in Asia for a musician. Assam gave him a 21-gun salute.

"Assam has lost not just a voice, but a heartbeat. Zubeen Da was more than a singer — he was the pride of Assam and the nation, whose songs carried our culture, our emotions, and our spirit to every corner of the world."

— Ashok Singhal, Assam Cabinet Minister
Cultural Programme — Zone 04 · In His Memory
Zubeen Tribute Concert

Special tribute night — Assam's finest musicians performing Zubeen Da's greatest songs — a collective act of love open to all.

Traditional Dance — All 7 States

Bihu, Manipuri, Cheraw, Naga war dances and folk performances from all 7 sister states on one grand stage.

NE Rock & Folk Nights

Live concerts featuring Northeast's acclaimed rock bands and folk artists — the music culture that Zubeen championed his entire life.

Zubeen Memorial Award

Annual award in Zubeen Da's name for an emerging NE artist embodying his spirit of service, courage and music.

♪   Aei jibone tumi aamar — "In this life, you are mine."   ♪

Crown Event

Mr. & Ms.
7 Sisters
Grand Finale

A high-glamour, media-friendly pageant celebrating the beauty, talent and cultural identity of the Northeast — designed to trend nationally and put the region permanently on India's cultural map.

Winners Receive

Cash prizes · Brand endorsements · National media coverage · Career-launching opportunities. Revenue via entry fees, title sponsorship, ticket sales, broadcast rights & merchandise.

01
Talent Round

All 7 states showcase indigenous talents — music, dance, art and craft — on a grand national stage.

02
Cultural Wear Round

Muga silk, Naga shawls, Manipuri Potloi — showcasing NE India's extraordinary textile heritage.

03
Personality Round

Vision, articulation and identity — representing the confident voice of a new Northeast generation.

About Us

Novara
Entertainment

A Universe of Creativity. A Single Destination for Everything.

Novara Entertainment is not just a company — it is an ecosystem, a powerhouse, and a complete creative universe designed to deliver excellence across every dimension of entertainment, events, and media. Built on the foundation of innovation, precision, and artistic brilliance, Novara stands as a one-stop solution where imagination meets execution at the highest level.

Complete Creative Ecosystem

One destination for all entertainment, events and media needs — from concept to execution at the highest level.

Innovation & Precision

Every project built on artistic brilliance and meticulous execution — where imagination truly meets reality.

Building Northeast's Future

Dedicated to creating opportunities, platforms and stages for Northeast India's extraordinary talent to reach the nation.

Financial Model

Revenue Strategy

Multiple streams ensure strong ROI for all sponsors, partners and government stakeholders across 3 days.

01
Exhibition Stall Fees

Premium and standard tier stalls from tech companies, IT firms, designers and lifestyle vendors across all 4 zones.

02
Sponsorship Packages

Title, Co-Title and Associate packages with exclusive branding across digital, print, on-ground and broadcast media.

03
Delegate & Event Passes

Tiered passes for AI Summit, conclave, fashion show and concerts. VIP hospitality for corporate and government delegates.

04
Broadcast & Media Rights

TV broadcast rights, OTT streaming, social media licensing and pageant broadcast rights generating post-event revenue.

Additional Revenue Streams
F&B · Merchandise · Pageant Entry Fees · Photography Rights · Digital & App Engagement
F&B ConcessionsMerchandisePageant EntryDigital Engagement
Why Now?

Why
This
Festival?

The Northeast has immense talent but limited national exposure. Students lack career clarity. Designers lack a platform. The technology awareness gap is wide. This festival fills every gap — creating economic activity, cultural pride and a massive tourism boost for Guwahati across 3 transformative days.

Long-Term Vision
Positioned to become the Davos of Northeast India — an annual landmark event drawing national investors, media and government attention.

Organised by Novara Entertainment — building the future of Northeast India, one event at a time.

Talent Without a National Stage

World-class music, fashion, tech and art — but no national platform. This 3-day festival changes that permanently.

100K+ Economic Impact for Guwahati

Expected 100,000+ footfall drawing national investors, media and government attention to Assam's capital over 3 days.

Career Clarity for NE Youth

First conclave connecting NE students with India's top universities, companies and mentors in one place.

Designed to Grow Annually

Built as a scalable platform — expanding in size, reach and impact every year as the Northeast's signature annual event.
